name: Spicy Authentic Moroccan Salmon - a Taste of Casablanca!
directions: On High heat, sauté the bell pepper in the canola oil until semi-soft. Add the tomato, and sauté for another 3 minutes.
Add the salt, pepper, and turmeric to the vegetables, and stir.
Coat the pieces of Salmon with the spices by placing each piece in the pan, flipping them, and leave them on top of the vegetables.
Lower the heat to medium, add enough water to cover the vegetables and salmon half way (about ½ cup).
Place the parsley on top of the salmon, and add the garlic and chilli peppers to the water.
Cover half way, and cook for 30 minutes or until the water lowers and becomes more of a sauce, and the fish turns a light pink.

name: Noodle Kugel
directions: Cook noodles according to package directions, drain.  Toss with butter, set aside.
In lg mixing bowl, beat eggs, sugar, sour cream, and cottage cheese until blended.  Mix in the noodles.
Pour into 13x9 baking dish, sprinkle cracker crumbs (mixed with butter) over top.
Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees of 50-55 minutes  Let stand for 10 minutes.

name: Falafel (From Dried Chick Peas)
directions: Soak garbanzo beans in water overnight.
Carefully drain garbanzo beans.
Place beans in food processor with other ingredients and pulse until coursely blended.
Let sit covered in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Form into balls of 1 Tbs.
Fry in deep fryer or deep skillet at 375 degrees until browned on outside (5-6 mins).
Remove from oil onto paper towel and sprinkle immediately with salt.

name: Stuffed Tomatoes
directions: Cut tomatoes in half and hollow out the halves with a spoon. Keep what you've hollowed out in a separate bowl.
Thoroughly blend ground beef, chicken and onions in a large bowl.
In a wide, shallow bowl, beat an egg. In another such bowl, blend bread crumbs (or matzo meal) with spices.
Stuff each tomato half with the beef mixture.

name: Cauliflower Salad With Tahini Dressing
directions: Grate 1 medium (1 1/2-lb.) head cauliflower into a large microwavable bowl or use riced cauliflower.
Stir in olive oil and 1/4 teaspoons kosher salt.
Cover with plastic wrap, and microwave 3 minutes.
Spread on a baking sheet; let cool 10 minutes.
Stir together finely chopped shallot and fresh lemon juice.
Let stand 10 minutes; stir in tahini.
Place cooled cauliflower in a large bowl.
Stir in tahini mixture, chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley, chopped dried cherries, chopped fresh mint, and 1/4 teaspoons kosher salt.
Sprinkle with chopped salted roasted pistachios.
